title: PqtrickPACK
description: All of my mods, shaders and packs for 1.21.1!
body:
# **Disclaimer:**
I take no credit for any of the mods, resource packs, etc. used in this modpack. All the work was done by the wonderful developers. I simply just threw what I liked together into one pack. If you are a developer and would like your mod removed from this modpack or have any issue, you can contact me via Discord: @pqtrick.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_QWkDg2tTAY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
